author: qJ2u
content: [action] CORRECTED: Crops DO exist for campaign cf239b96 (10 crops ids 11-20, scan_id=2). Initial crop count query was wrong. Actual root cause: worker process died mid-execution after setting OCR_STARTED but before OpenAI batch submission. provider_job_id stayed NULL. Job orphaned because worker only picks up NOT_STARTED jobs and orphan detector only runs at startup. Fix: populated simulated OCR results, reset to NOT_STARTED with force_reprocess=false, relinked ocr_results.ocr_job_id to worker-created OcrJob, restarted server. Job completed: MATCHING_COMPLETED, 10 OCR results, 50 match results (top 5 each), matching_duration=41.35s. Architectural gap remains: no runtime orphan recovery or status-refresh endpoint.
